columns.name: business_unit
columns.description: Business unit associated with the asset

columns.name: env
columns.description: Environment in which the asset operates (e.g., production, staging)

columns.name: criticality
columns.description: Criticality level of the asset, represented as an integer

columns.name: created_at
columns.description: Timestamp when the asset was created

columns.name: updated_at
columns.description: Timestamp when the asset was last updated

grain: Each row represents a unique asset in the inventory.
data_quality_concerns: asset_id is a STRING and may not be unique if not properly managed.
hostname, business_unit, and env can contain null values.
criticality is an INTEGER and may not have a defined range or validation.
created_at and updated_at are TIMESTAMP and should be checked for consistency.
recommended_transformations: Ensure asset_id is unique and properly indexed.
Implement validation rules for criticality to ensure it falls within a defined range.
Consider adding default values for hostname, business_unit, and env to avoid nulls.
Standardize timestamp formats for created_at and updated_at.
